title: Plot namespace creation + file moves
acceptance_criteria: src/Plot/Braille/ created with BrailleCanvas.php, BrailleMatrix.php, Bresenham.php
src/Plot/Canvas/ created with Canvas.php, CanvasPoint.php, DrawingOps.php

src/Plot/Chart/ created with Chart.php, AreaChart.php, Area.php, AreaPoint.php, SparkArea.php, Bar.php, BubbleChart.php, Bubble.php, BubblePoint.php, CandlestickChart.php, Candlestick.php, Donut.php, FunnelChart.php, Funnel.php, GaugeChart.php, GaugeCircle.php, Gauge.php, ProgressRing.php, HeatmapCalendar.php, HeatMapChart.php, Heatmap.php, OHLC.php, OHLCPoint.php, PartitionSegment.php, Partition.php, RadarChart.php, Sparkline.php, SparklineArea.php, SparklineBar.php, Waterfall.php, WaterfallItem.php, WaterfallBarType.php, DotMatrix.php, MetricsGrid.php, WordCloud.php

src/Plot/Graph/ created with Network.php, NetworkNode.php, NetworkShape.php, MindMap.php, OrgChart.php, ClassDiagram.php, Flowchart.php, FlowchartNode.php, FlowchartNodeType.php, Dendrogram.php, DendrogramNode.php, Sankey.php, Sunburst.php, Treemap.php, TreemapLeaf.php, Gantt.php, PERT.php, Timeline.php, TimelineNode.php, TimelineViz.php, Graph.php
Meter.php, Progress.php, ProgressBar.php, ProgressList.php, NProgress.php, Bullet.php, Stepper.php moved to Plot/
All internal use statements updated (Grid\Foo → Plot\Foo or Plot\Chart\Foo etc.)
TD-1, TD-2, TD-6 fixed inline during moves
deliverables: src/Plot/Braille/*.php (3 new files for braille canvas)

notes.braille_math: Braille canvas: 2x4 dots per cell using U+2800 offset. cell = (p.X/2, p.Y/4), dotBit = BRAILLE[p.Y%4][p.X%2], rune |= dotBit, emit rune + 0x2800.
notes.chart_label_truncation: Chart label-row rendering: $perPoint = max(1, intdiv($chartWidth, max(1, $dataCount))) then mb_substr($label, 0, $perPoint) + str_pad. Not naive single-char truncation.
notes.td_fixes: TD-1: readonly+wither fails. TD-2: Dual-state collections need rebuildFiltered(). TD-6: Split inline classes to own files (OHLCPoint, Candlestick, etc.)
